role: The host `meta` binary: multi-repo workspace management CLI that clones/coordinates child repos, runs parallel cross-repo exec, manages worktrees and dependency graphs. Discovers and dispatches to subprocess plugins via a large registry (registry.rs 70K, subprocess_plugins.rs 45K) and installs Ollama skills/rules via `meta init ollama`.
northstar: Meta makes multi-repo feel like monorepo without the downsides; the canon machinery stays green, versioned by the parent distribution.
next_command: Plan in kb first (git kb board); mint execution cards via hf (ADR-0003)
